title: hieracium laevigans
intro: Hieracium laevigans, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium laevigans include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Hieracium laevigans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
